summary: This document is a cartoon illustration featuring a stylized zombie or monster character on an orange background. It contains no scientific content, experimental data, or information relevant to biotechnology development or TRL assessment.

content_blocks.content: Cartoon illustration of a green zombie or monster face with mismatched eyes (one bloodshot eyeball, one with a flame), exposed brain matter, crooked teeth, and protruding tongue on an orange background. This is purely decorative artwork with no scientific or technical content.
